---
title: "Week 12"
date: 04-23-26
description: |
  We will learn Bootstrapping.
editor: source
draft: false
---

## Resources

| Lecture   | Slides                       | Annotated  | Video     |
|-----------|------------------------------|------------|-----------|
| Thursday | | [Notes](../lectures/12b_annotated.pdf) | [Video](https://youtu.be/8LKs1ooyl2w) |
